title: The Future of Generative AI in Production
description: An in-depth look at scaling LLMs for enterprise applications, focusing on latency, cost optimization, and RAG architectures.

title: WebAssembly: Beyond the Browser
description: Exploring how WebAssembly is revolutionizing serverless computing and edge orchestration with near-native performance.

title: Hardening the Software Supply Chain
description: Practical strategies for implementing SLSA, SBOMs, and automated vulnerability scanning in modern CI/CD pipelines.

title: Architecting for Global Scale
description: Lessons learned from building multi-region, active-active architectures that handle millions of requests per second.

title: The Next Decade of Frontend Performance
description: Deep dive into partial hydration, server components, and how to achieve perfect Lighthouse scores in complex SPAs.

title: Designing Resilient Microservices
description: Best practices for circuit breaking, bulkhead patterns, and observability in highly decoupled service ecosystems.
